testcase.name: test_m2b_bob_accept_no_double_refunds_alice_excess
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter232_double_validation.py:143: in test_m2b_bob_accept_no_double_refunds_alice_excess assert r.status_code == 200, f"claim: {r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: claim: 500 {"detail":"Une erreur est survenue. L'équipe JAPAP a été notifiée."} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_m2c_bob_accept_with_double
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter232_double_validation.py:175: in test_m2c_bob_accept_with_double assert r.status_code == 200, f"claim double: {r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: claim double: 500 {"detail":"Une erreur est survenue. L'équipe JAPAP a été notifiée."} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
